title: Tunisian Ham and Roasted Veggie Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired dish featuring roasted vegetables, crispy ham, and a hint of Tunisian spices.
instructions: Cut the roasted red bell peppers into strips.
Sauté the red onion in olive oil until softened.
Add the Tunisian olives, Parma ham, and spices to the pan.
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with roasted red bell pepper strips.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.
